summary: Kim Hajin discovers he is burdened by a 300,000-dollar debt, facing severe consequences if he cannot repay it, which prompts him to seek legal ways to earn money, settling on 'field hunting'. He travels to the Gangwon Province's monster-hunting fields, where he hires the eager agent Park Soohyuk. Hajin then prepares to confront a Steel Boar, showcasing his specially modified, high-grade Desert Eagle pistol, which he acquired through a prior information exchange with Yoo Yeonha.
key_moments: Kim Hajin learns he is 300,000 dollars in debt and must find a way to earn money quickly.
He decides to pursue 'field hunting' as stock investments are not viable and travels to the Gangwon Province hunting area.
Hajin meets and contracts with the enthusiastic agent Park Soohyuk to handle the sale of monster parts.
He targets a Steel Boar and reveals his unique, high-grade Desert Eagle pistol, customized with special attributes and obtained from Yoo Yeonha.
Hajin prepares to use his powerful weapon to hunt the Steel Boar, demonstrating its destructive capabilities.
